name: Promo
description: Outcomes from promo segments affecting crowd reaction and grades

entries.templateText: FAVORED grabs the mic and cuts a blistering promo declaring they are done waiting — UNDERDOG gets a title match next week or FAVORED walks.
FAVORED's promo falls flat as the crowd chants for UNDERDOG throughout, completely undercutting the moment.
FAVORED stands on the announcer's desk, hoisting their championship gear and issuing a worldwide open challenge to anyone in the back.
FAVORED demands a microphone, pointing directly at the champion's locker room and vowing to take everything they hold dear.
FAVORED interrupts a championship celebration, listing every single shortcut the titleholder took to keep the gold.
FAVORED cuts an intense, pre-taped vignette from the streets of their hometown, promising a championship reign built on raw sacrifice.
FAVORED guarantees victory in the upcoming title bout, bringing out an actual contract to force a high-stakes signature from the champion.
FAVORED lays down their ultimate ultimatum: a championship match at the grandest event of the year, or they tear the division apart.
FAVORED targets the champion's lineage, claiming the gold was handed to them on a silver platter rather than truly earned.
FAVORED lists every legend they've conquered, making it crystal clear that the reigning champion is merely the next victim on the list.
FAVORED absolutely dismantles UNDERDOG verbally, exposing their biggest career failures in a cold, calculated verbal takedown.
FAVORED uses inside knowledge to mock the personal life of UNDERDOG, leaving them visibly shaken and speechless center ring.
FAVORED brings up old developmental footage of UNDERDOG, laughing at how little talent they had then and how little they have now.
FAVORED systematically breaks down the wrestling style of UNDERDOG, calling them an unoriginal, over-hyped indie cosplay act.
FAVORED informs UNDERDOG that they are nothing more than a transitional opponent meant to pad a real superstar's win-loss record.
FAVORED delivers an incredibly harsh truth bomb regarding the crowd's fading interest in UNDERDOG, drawing a stunned gasp from the arena.
FAVORED calls UNDERDOG a spineless coward who hides behind faction members because they can't survive a single one-on-one encounter.
FAVORED brings out a custom highlight reel showcasing every time UNDERDOG has tapped out or fallen short on the big stage.
UNDERDOG completely interrupts a lengthy monologue from FAVORED, hitting them with a brilliant, lightning-fast comeback line that leaves FAVORED stuttering.
UNDERDOG fires back at the arrogant claims of FAVORED, delivering a passionate, throat-tearing promo that brings the entire arena to its feet.
UNDERDOG exposes a major hypocrisy in the career of FAVORED, completely turning the live audience against the self-proclaimed hero.
UNDERDOG stands toe-to-toe with FAVORED, telling them to stop talking about past accolades and actually fight right now.
UNDERDOG delivers a short, incredibly punchy response that makes FAVORED look completely foolish and over-rehearsed.
UNDERDOG commands the microphone, reminding FAVORED exactly who built this division while FAVORED was sitting on the sidelines.
UNDERDOG drops the mic entirely, staring deep into the eyes of a ranting FAVORED with complete, unbothered confidence.
UNDERDOG uses a brilliant chant to get twenty thousand fans actively mocking FAVORED out of the building.
FAVORED delivers an exceptionally emotional speech about overcoming adversity, beautifully connecting with every single fan in attendance.
FAVORED takes a moment to thank the local city, seamlessly transitioning into a high-energy rallying cry that electrifies the stadium.
FAVORED speaks directly to a young fan in the front row, promising to bring the championship home for everyone who ever felt left behind.
FAVORED leads the entire arena in a massive, thunderous catchphrase chant that completely echoes through the broadcast audio.
FAVORED uses their incredible charisma to turn an otherwise standard interview segment into a massive, arena-wide party atmosphere.
FAVORED acknowledges their past mistakes on the microphone, earning a deep, genuine wave of respect and applause from the audience.
FAVORED speaks from the heart about their grueling path to the roster, prompting a massive standing ovation across all seating sections.
FAVORED delivers a masterclass in crowd manipulation, having the fans hanging on every single syllable they utter.
FAVORED attempts to cut a deeply villainous heel promo, but their insult toward UNDERDOG is so incredibly cool that the crowd starts cheering instead.
FAVORED tries to draw cheap heat by insulting the local sports team, but the crowd completely drowns them out with a massive chant for UNDERDOG.
FAVORED spends minutes bragging about their expensive lifestyle, only for the crowd to erupt into a loud chant labeling them completely boring.
FAVORED demands absolute silence from the audience, which immediately prompts a stadium-wide, chaotic singing chant that derails the entire script.
FAVORED insults the integrity of UNDERDOG, but the crowd response is so overwhelmingly supportive of UNDERDOG that FAVORED visibly loses their temper.
FAVORED tries to explain their treacherous actions from last week, but the crowd's deafening refusal to listen completely ruins the explanation.
A controversial, unscripted social media video posted by FAVORED surfaces on the titan screen, exposing a massive secret alliance.
UNDERDOG leaks a series of private, highly toxic text messages sent by FAVORED, completely shattering the pristine public image of FAVORED.
FAVORED goes live on social media from an unauthorized location, trashing management and threatening to hijack tonight's broadcast.
A viral training video posted by UNDERDOG gains immense mainstream traction, generating massive fan support ahead of the match with FAVORED.
FAVORED starts an aggressive, online trending campaign that successfully makes UNDERDOG the absolute laughingstock of the internet.
A wild, multi-platform internet flame war between FAVORED and UNDERDOG reaches a boiling point, forcing the promotion to address it on air.
FAVORED posts an incredibly disrespectful video from inside the training facility of UNDERDOG, defacing their personal property.
An anonymous account leaks footage of FAVORED training with a banned foreign object, drawing heavy scrutiny from the fan base.
During a tense backstage sit-down interview, FAVORED drops a massive bombshell revealing that UNDERDOG actively tried to get them fired.
An exclusive media scrum interview goes completely off the rails as FAVORED flips a table and storms out after a question about UNDERDOG.
FAVORED breaks character slightly during a late-night talk show appearance, delivering a deeply authentic warning straight to UNDERDOG.
A legendary broadcast journalist conducts a hard-hitting interview with UNDERDOG, perfectly highlighting their struggle against an oppressive FAVORED.
Backstage cameras capture FAVORED having an incredibly intense, closed-door argument with their long-time personal trainer.
FAVORED interrupts a routine broadcast update, commandeering the microphone to reveal a shocking injury status report regarding UNDERDOG.
A special documentary chronicle tracks the intense preparation of FAVORED, making their upcoming match feel like an absolute historic event.
FAVORED crashes a corporate sponsor presentation backstage, demanding that their face be placed on every piece of promotional material.
FAVORED calls out the General Manager directly, claiming the entire corporate system is actively rigged to prevent them from becoming champion.
FAVORED refuses to compete tonight, calling the corporate executives completely incompetent until their exact financial demands are met.
FAVORED tears up a formal disciplinary memo live on television, completely defying an official suspension order from management.
FAVORED brings an actual lawyer into the ring, threatening a massive, company-wide lawsuit if they are forced to wrestle UNDERDOG tonight.
FAVORED sits down in the center of the ring, staging a complete broadcast protest until the Board of Directors grants them a meeting.
FAVORED targets the authority figure's past career, delivering a blistering verbal takedown of their failed run as an active competitor.
FAVORED attacks an official corporate spokesperson on the microphone, completely crossing the line into total corporate insubordination.
FAVORED hijacks the production truck, cutting off the executive producer's audio feed to broadcast their own raw, unfiltered manifesto.
FAVORED invokes the legendary history of the territory, delivering a deeply traditional, old-school promo centered on fighting honor and respect.
FAVORED brings out a Hall of Fame veteran to endorse them, cementing their status as the true, hand-picked future of the entire industry.
FAVORED claims that the current generation of wrestlers has completely gone soft, vowing to bring back a brutal style of old-school discipline.
FAVORED delivers an incredibly powerful tribute promo honoring a fallen legend, uniting the roster and the fans in a beautiful moment.
FAVORED talks about their twenty-year career, stating that their upcoming match with UNDERDOG is a matter of securing their ultimate legacy.
FAVORED openly mocks a legendary veteran who is sitting at ringside, completely disrespecting the rich history of the business.
FAVORED compares their current historic championship reign to the greatest icons of the past, claiming they've already surpassed every single one.
FAVORED delivers a chilling promo about what it truly means to be a professional wrestler, earning a rare nod of respect from their worst critics.
The verbal battle between FAVORED and UNDERDOG becomes so incredibly intense that they drop their microphones and immediately start swinging fists.
FAVORED blindsides UNDERDOG with a microphone shot right to the head mid-sentence, initiating a wild, chaotic ring-clearing brawl.
A massive face-to-face promo segment completely breaks down as twenty locker room security guards swarm the ring to keep FAVORED and UNDERDOG apart.
FAVORED attempts to attack UNDERDOG during their entrance promo, leading to an incredibly frantic brawl that spills all over the concrete floor.
A tense contract signing promo dissolves into absolute chaos as FAVORED throws UNDERDOG directly through the heavy wooden signing table.
UNDERDOG ducks a surprise attack from FAVORED at the end of a promo, hitting their finisher to stand tall over a broken FAVORED.
A heated back-and-forth verbal argument escalates until FAVORED's entire stable rushes the ring, initiating a brutal numbers-game assault on UNDERDOG.
FAVORED and UNDERDOG lock eyes, throw their microphones over the top rope, and launch into a vicious hockey-style punch exchange as the crowd goes insane.
